problem id: db360db0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  11011100 -> 01000110
  01011110 -> 01000011
  00111111 -> 00000001
  01001111 -> 11100011
  11111100 -> 00000111
  10101010 -> 10101111
  11100010 -> 00111111
  01001101 -> 11100111

query: 10011110
predicted answer: 11000110
